I sling furious fowl into rickety wooden towers built by green pigs who stole their eggs.
A ten-year-old leaves home on foot to capture dangerous wildlife in tiny balls and force them to fight adults for money.
Fell off my board a million times while listening to punk rock, but successfully landed a 900 over a helicopter.
An interactive story where you make agonizing moral choices, only for the characters to die miserably anyway. 10/10 sadness.
A square jumps over triangles while intense techno music plays. I have memorized the level out of pure frustration.
Aggressively slashing watermelons and apples with a katana, but occasionally hitting a bomb and ruining everything.
I stole a golden idol and now I'm infinitely sprinting through ruins while being chased by terrifying demon monkeys.
My lawn defense strategy solely relies on planting weaponized sunflowers and explosive cherries to stop the undead.
My infant son was kidnapped, but I am currently distracted by building a shanty town out of desk fans and tin cans.
An armored bounty hunter shoots aliens in a creepy underground maze, and then the entire planet explodes at the end.
Walked for three hours through the woods, found a can of beans, and immediately got sniped by a player hiding in a bush.
Hiding in a locker for 20 minutes because a terrifying extraterrestrial creature is stomping around in the hallway.
A beautiful, heartwarming story about overcoming anxiety by repeatedly dying on a mountain made of spikes.
Trying to escape my dad's house in the underworld, but the layout keeps changing and he keeps sending his employees to stop me.
I descended into a cave, threw a rope, hit a bat, fell into a pit of spikes, and the ghost of time chased me out.
